sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT article_id) FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name};
SELECT article_title FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name});
SELECT MIN(author_count) FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name});
SELECT MAX(reference_count) FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name});
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT article_id) FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name} AND author_position = 0;
SELECT article_title FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name} AND author_position = 0);
SELECT AVG(author_count) FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name} AND author_position = 0);
SELECT SUM(title_word_count) FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name} AND author_position = 0);
SELECT DISTINCT author_name FROM article_author WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM articles WHERE title_word_count = {title-word-count});
SELECT DISTINCT author_name FROM article_author WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id from articles) AND article_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id_cited from citing_cited);

SELECT article_title FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(citation_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS citation_count FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited)))

SELECT reference_count FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(citation_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS citation_count FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited)))

SELECT author_count FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(citation_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS citation_count FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited)))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited HAVING COUNT(*) = 1) AS once_cited
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited);
SELECT AVG(citation_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS citation_count FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited) AS citation_stats;
SELECT article_title FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited));
SELECT reference_count FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited));
SELECT author_count FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_citing FROM citing_cited) AND article_id IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited);
